details: governance_contracts_present: reports/board/ directory is MISSING. Expected reports/audit/ (present) and reports/board/ (absent).
no_deprecated_dirs: moltbot/ directory still exists at repo root with active Python modules (board.py, orchestrator.py, sentinel.py, etc.). This was previously flagged for removal.

no_clawdbot_moltbot: Moltbot references found in active code/scripts — scripts/run_molt_workflow.py imports from moltbot package; scripts/run_molt_intelligence_expansion.py references Moltbot; moltbot/ directory contains live Python code. MEMORY_BANK_ALPACA.md documents moltbot paths but those are documentation references. scripts/run_openclaw_molt_synthesis.py references Clawdbot (stub removal note). Excluded: reports/audit/*, reports/daily/*, docs/* (allowed to document removal).
